texto: How are you? My father could say this quicker than anybody. He was always the first to say how are you, provided the occasion called for it, and he saw his chance. Thanks to this skill, he was made ambassador to England ...
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Péter Esterházy que provoca temas ligados a reflexao. Ao questionar “How are you? My father could say this quicker than anybody. He was always the first to say how ar…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, humour, father, com foco em reflexao.
